style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial diagram of a tall column of labelled drawers, each drawer a thin rectangle stacked vertically. The drawers carry labels: BUILD, REVIEW, CYBER, A11Y, RELEASE, TRANSLATE, DOCUMENT. One drawer in the middle is pulled half open and a small stack of pages rises out of it. Hand-drawn lines, navy and rust on warm cream paper. No people, no logos.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in French. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial diagram of a tall column of labelled drawers, each drawer a thin rectangle stacked vertically. The drawers carry labels: BUILD, REVIEW, CYBER, A11Y, RELEASE, TRANSLATE, DOCUMENT. One drawer in the middle is pulled half open and a small stack of pages rises out of it. Hand-drawn lines, navy and rust on warm cream paper. No people, no logos.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
